name: Jellyfin Federation
description: Aggregate content from multiple Jellyfin servers into unified virtual libraries
overview: The Jellyfin Federation Plugin allows you to create a unified media library by aggregating content from multiple remote Jellyfin servers. Stream content from any server without file synchronization.
changelog: Config page rewrite: sidebar link, guided setup, working buttons, auto-detect public URL. Same-name libraries across servers merge into one. Advanced settings collapsed by default.
